title: halimium nutans
intro: Halimium nutans, also known as Rock Rose or Sticky Rockrose, is a flowering succulent plant native to the Iberian Peninsula and parts of North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and stress. The health benefits of Halimium nutans include its ability to promote relaxation, improve sleep quality, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress-related disorders. Herbal preparations of Halimium nutans can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their therapeutic effects.
